items.title: Uttarakhand School Holiday Today: Schools, Anganwadi Centres Closed In Dehradun Due To Heavy Rain
items.summary: Uttarakhand School Holiday Today: All schools and Anganwadi centres in Dehradun will remain closed on July 10, 2026, due to heavy rain and an IMD orange alert.

items.title: Four shooters killed in Gurugram encounter after attack on businessman’s house
items.summary: In the exchange of fire, all five shooters were hit. They were rushed to hospital where four were declared dead. One is undergoing treatment.
